name: Chinese-Style Broiled Chicken Breasts
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Chicken Breasts, boned with Wings attached
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the breasts with salt and pepper.
2. In a large dish, combine soy sauce, maple syrup, oil, vinegar, garlic, and red pepper flakes. Mix well.
3. Add chicken breast halves and coat them with the marinade. Arrange skin side up in the dish and cover with plastic wrap. Let stand 15 minutes, or until ready to cook.
4. Meanwhile, preheat broiler or a charcoal grill. Place breasts skin side down in one layer in a baking dish.
5. Broil under the heat for about 6 minutes, turning pieces occasionally. Cook skin side up for about 2 minutes.
6. Shift pan to lower rack and continue broiling skin side up with door partly open for another 5 minutes.
7. Turn chicken skin side down and broil an additional 5 minutes on bottom rack.
8. Return pieces skin side up, pour remaining marinade over all, and place about 6 inches from heat. Broil about 2 more minutes.
(If using a barbecue, cook the chicken on hot grill, covered, for the same total time.)
